summary: Defines Apdex, an index from 0 to 1 measuring user satisfaction with application response time. Samples are partitioned into Satisfied, Tolerating, and Frustrated zones by a target threshold T and a frustration threshold F = 4T, and the index is computed as Apdex_T = (Satisfied count + Tolerating count / 2) / Total samples. The specification also defines report-group requirements and how the index and its threshold must be displayed (e.g. 0.85 [4.0]).
title: Application Performance Index — Apdex Technical Specification
